description: Into the Fray Patch 7 (5 October 2022) — New Victory Emotes, Twitch Drops, Combat Balance Changes (Arcane Staffs, Cursed Staffs, Daggers, Fire Staffs, Frost Staffs, Holy Staffs, Quarterstaffs, Nature Staffs, Helmets, Armors, Shoes, Food, Diminishing Returns, 2v2 Hellgates), Fixes.

sections.heading: New Victory Emotes
sections.description: Six new Victory Emotes available via the Appearance menu for Gold or via Twitch Drops: Hellgate, Sword, Hammer, Mobile Banner, Desktop Banner, Controller Banner.
items: Hellgate
Sword
Hammer
Mobile Banner
Desktop Banner
Controller Banner
sections.searchable_text: Victory Emotes Hellgate Sword Hammer Mobile Desktop Controller Banner Appearance Gold Twitch Drops

sections.heading: Expanded Twitch Drops
sections.description: The Amethyst Unicorn, Entertainer's Costume, and Entertainer's Shoes have been added to possible Twitch Drops.
sections.searchable_text: Twitch Drops Amethyst Unicorn Entertainer's Costume Shoes

sections.heading: Other Changes and Improvements
items: The Claim Rewards UI has been reworked with paging, scrolling, and visual improvements
Custom Matches can now be initiated by a third party player acting as an organizer who invites two teams without taking part
Removed obsolete / outdated Castle Season Point Breakdown information from UIs
Guild Estates UI now shows HQ Qualification and Booster information for guilds with a Headquarters Hideout
Furniture can no longer be placed on top of loot bags
[Mobile] Increased auto-target maximum range
sections.searchable_text: Claim Rewards UI Custom Matches third party organizer Castle Season Point Guild Estates HQ Qualification Booster furniture loot bags Mobile auto-target

subsections.heading: Arcane Staffs
subsections.searchable_text: Arcane Staffs Chain Missile Arcane Charge Duration 6s 3s Bounce Range 8m 7m Damage bounce 121 60 Enigma Blade 180 165 Time Freeze Cooldown 10s Player Immunity 5s 15s Dark Sphere Slow Strength 25% 15%

changes.raw_text: Chain Missile: Arcane Charge Duration: 6s → 3s; Projectile Bounce Range: 8m → 7m; Damage for each bounce after the first: 121 → 60 (first target still takes 121 damage)
notes: The first target hit still takes 121 damage

changes.raw_text: Enigma Blade: Damage: 180 → 165
Time Freeze (Great Arcane): Cooldown increased by 10s. Player Immunity after a Player Freeze: 5s → 15s. The Time Freeze Immunity is now displayed as a visual buff on players.
notes: Time Freeze Immunity is now displayed as a visual buff on players

changes.raw_text: Dark Sphere (Evensong): Slow Strength: 25% → 15%

Anguished Soul (Demonic Staff): Damage: 175 → 160

Mystic Rocks (Staff of Balance): Activating the ability now removes all HoTs on the caster
notes: Activating the ability now removes all HoTs on the caster

subsections.searchable_text: Shoes Battle Frenzy Graveguard Boots Movement Speed 40% 55% Duration 6s 5s Energetic Sprint Cloth Sandals Energy per Tick 4 5 Frost Walk Druid Sandals Move Speed 45% 55% Premonition Boots of Valor First Buff Duration 2s 3s Movement Speed 20% 45%

Energetic Sprint: Energy per Tick: 4 → 5

subsections.heading: Food
subsections.searchable_text: Food Crab Omelettes Energy Cost Reduction Factor 0.05 0.06 T7 9.5% 11.3%

changes.raw_text: Crab Omelettes: Energy Cost Reduction Factor: 0.05 → 0.06 (example T7: 9.5% → 11.3%)
Max Diminishing Return Duration: 20s → 15s
2v2 Hellgates: Healing Reduction: 10% → 20%

sections.heading: Fixes
items: Guild Finder: Fixed issue where adjusting language filter could cause empty pages; rejoining a guild within cooldown now shows correct error message
The shield of Blessed Aurora (Oathkeepers) can now be removed by shield-breaking abilities
Fixed issue where players affected by Time Freeze could still reflect damage
Fixed issue where overlapping aura spells would not update correctly, causing Dark Sphere stacks to behave inconsistently
Fixed issue where mount spells would sometimes not go on cooldown after changing clusters
Fixed issue where inside a Corrupted Dungeon, the entrance would incorrectly show an exit tooltip
Fixed issue where Exit Dungeon spell would sometimes not work in Hellgates
Fixed issue where Alliance UI remained stuck in a default view after creating an alliance
[Mobile] Fixed issue where zooming on a map would also zoom the ingame camera
[Controller] Fixed issue where it was not possible to open loot chests with a Dynamic Action
Various additional graphical, UI, terrain, animation, audio, and localization fixes
sections.searchable_text: Fixes Guild Finder language filter Blessed Aurora Oathkeepers shield-breaking Time Freeze reflect damage Dark Sphere stacks mount spells cooldown clusters Corrupted Dungeon entrance tooltip Exit Dungeon Hellgates Alliance UI Mobile zoom Controller loot chests Dynamic Action graphical UI terrain animation audio localization
